upstreamBehavior: Mermaid renders composite-state examples that reuse [*] start/end pseudostates inside nested states. Agentic Mermaid preserves and renders the sources, but verify currently reports EDGE_MISANCHORED against the projected graph for nested pseudostate endpoints.
notes: Executable ledger: src/__tests__/agent-mermaid-corpus.test.ts proves these examples parse and round-trip, and that the warning code is the expected one.

upstreamBehavior: Mermaid renders point radius/color/stroke metadata and classDef styling for quadrant charts. Agentic Mermaid preserves the source and renders the chart, but typed mutation/layout metadata intentionally does not model those styling attributes yet.
notes: Executable ledger: the corpus test proves the official styled example parses, verifies with UNSUPPORTED_SYNTAX, and round-trips without dropping style source.
